title: Software Design Goals
summary: New article about software design goals - the commonly occurring reasons behind why we make the design decisions we do. There is both a textual and a video version of the article. There is a link to the video from within the article.
content:
New article about software design goals - the commonly occurring reasons behind
                why we make the design decisions we do. There is both a textual and a video version
                of the article. There is a link to the video from within the article.
